name: DATS Digivice
effect: Must be equipped to digivolve your partner. Glows when wild or hostile Digimon are within 6 spaces. As a Free Action, scan one visible enemy to learn their Attribute and Element. As a Basic Action, perform a deep scan to learn their Attribute, Element, and one combat stat of your choice. Responds to Digisoul — Tamers with the Marcus class tree's Digisoul Charge ability will find this Digivice glows noticeably brighter during a charge. The DATS Digivice supports digivolution up to Mega stage.
notes: Cap: Mega. Responds to Digisoul. Free Action: Attribute + Element. Basic Action: deep scan + 1 combat stat.
